State Laws Affected; Definitions, , , provided that:Pub. L. 93–443, title I, § 10488 Stat. 1272Oct. 15, 1974“(a)The provisions of chapter 29 of title 18, United States Code, relating to elections and political activities, supersede and preempt any provision of State law with respect to election to Federal office.“(b)For purposes of this section, the terms ‘election’, ‘Federal office’, and ‘State’ have the meanings given them by , United States Code.”section 591 of title 18
